hooks.command: if grep -Eq '(^|[^[:alnum:]])git[[:space:]]+push'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A git push just ran — do NOT treat it as done until CI is green. Watch it now: run `gh run list --branch <branch> --limit 1` to get the run id, then `gh run watch <id> --exit-status`. If CI FAILS, run `gh run view <id> --log-failed`, fix the root cause, and re-push. Before EVERY push, run the full CI gates locally first (this exact set, scope .): `ruff check .`, `ruff format --check .`, `mypy src/ tests/`, and `pytest`."}}'; fi; true
